mapper.select: SELECT t.* FROM tb_audit_plan t WHERE t.deleted = 0 ORDER BY t.created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_audit_plan WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT t.* FROM tb_audit_plan t WHERE t.deleted = 0 AND (t.approved IS NULL OR t.approved = 0) ORDER BY t.created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_audit_plan WHERE deleted = 0 AND (approved IS NULL OR approved = 0)
SELECT t.* FROM tb_audit_plan t WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.deleted = 0
SELECT t.* FROM tb_audit_plan t WHERE t.status = #{status} AND t.deleted = 0 ORDER BY t.created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_audit_plan WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_audit_plan WHERE plan_id LIKE #{prefix} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_audit_plan ( plan_id, audit_name, audit_type, target_dept, auditor_name, auditor_dept, person_in_charge, plan_start_date, plan_end_date, purpose, status, notes, checklist_template_id, created_by, modified_by, plan_approver, completion_approver, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{planId}, #{auditName}, #{auditType}, #{targetDept}, #{auditorName}, #{auditorDept}, #{personInCharge}, #{planStartDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{planEndDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{purpose}, #{status}, #{notes}, #{checklistTemplateId}, #{createdBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, #{modifiedBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, #{planApprover,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, #{completionApprover,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_audit_plan SET audit_name = #{auditName}, audit_type = #{auditType}, target_dept = #{targetDept}, auditor_name = #{auditorName}, auditor_dept = #{auditorDept}, person_in_charge = #{personInCharge}, plan_start_date = #{planStartDate,jdbcType=DATE}, plan_end_date = #{planEndDate,jdbcType=DATE}, purpose = #{purpose}, status = COALESCE(#{status}, status, 'PLAN'), notes = #{notes}, checklist_template_id = #{checklistTemplateId}, plan_approver = #{planApprover,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, completion_approver = #{completionApprover,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, modified_by = #{modifiedBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_audit_plan SET status = 'PENDING_APPROVAL', reject_reason = NULL, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE tb_audit_plan SET approved = 1, approved_by = #{approvedBy}, approved_at = GETDATE(), plan_approved_by = #{approvedBy}, plan_approved_at = GETDATE(), status = 'APPROVED', modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE tb_audit_plan SET approved = 0, approved_by = NULL, approved_at = NULL, plan_approved_by = NULL, plan_approved_at = NULL, status = 'PLAN', reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_audit_plan SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT t.* FROM tb_audit_plan t WHERE t.checklist_template_id = #{checklistTemplateId} AND t.deleted = 0
